response: The iPhone 15 Pro is priced at $999 and features a 6.1‑inch OLED display driven by the A17 Pro chip. It sports a 48‑megapixel main camera, a 3274 mAh battery, and offers storage options from 128 GB up to 1 TB, all packed into a lightweight 187‑gram body. The device has earned an impressive rating of 4.6 out of 5 stars.
